top_signals.title: Palantir ‘should challenge Sadiq Khan in court’ over blocked Met Police contract
top_signals.summary: American tech firm Palantir should challenge Sadiq Khan in court after the London mayor blocked a £50m contract with the Metropolitan Police, former government legal officer Sir Michael Ellis has said.   Sir Michael Ellis KC, a former Tory attorney general under Liz Truss, said Khan’s decision is “an extraordinary intervention, which may be susceptible to [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
